positive: A celestial jungle silhouette design, featuring interwoven bioluminescent flora and mystical fauna. The composition is highly symmetrical and central, built on crisp, clean black cutouts against a solid, vibrant teal background. Elements include stylized tropical leaves, geometric glowing butterflies, mythological winged creatures (like hummingbirds or stylized phoenixes), and swirling cosmic vines. Use strong, defined outlines and a limited palette of complementary glowing colors (electric yellow, deep cyan, magenta) paired with crisp black ink for maximum contrast. The overall style should evoke Art Deco meeting mystical naturalism, highly scalable and perfect for repeat apparel patterns or single-focus prints. Focus on clean edges and flat graphic design principles. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast, intricate detail, symmetrical composition.
